screen.template_mod.lever_cobweb.title: Nemos Helper!
screen.template_mod.lever_cobweb.subtitl: Tune the water switch and item return timing.
screen.template_mod.lever_cobweb.row.spe: Cycles the delay between water, pickup and cobweb placement.
screen.template_mod.lever_cobweb.row.thr: Lets right click use the block behind a player instead of their hitbox.
While inside a cobweb, sneaks and tries to place through it with the mechanism.
screen.template_mod.lever_cobweb.row.swi: After the sequence ends, equips the strongest sword from your main inventory.
screen.template_mod.lever_cobweb.row.hol: Only works with a lever in the offhand and places it inside the matching 3-block setup.
screen.template_mod.lever_cobweb.row.mod: Runs on blocked cobweb placements, including lever setups.
